key_finding: Local (SEAR-style) attacks detected with F1=0.90 and perfect recall. Clean-vs-global separation weaker (overlapping Grad-CAM signatures). Original entropy-only hypothesis refined: magnitude as second feature enables three-way separation that entropy alone could not achieve.
methodology_note: Entropy alone separated clean-vs-attacked but not local-vs-global. Adding Grad-CAM magnitude as second feature resolved this partially. Documented deviation from original single-feature hypothesis.
